_comment: Local-dev stub. CI overwrites this with repo.json content at release time. Edit repo.json (the single source of truth); this file only exists so local debug builds load with sensible metadata.
Author: MTVirux
Name: TempoTerror
Punchline: Scrolling skill timeline overlay powered by IINACT.
Description:
Real-time scrolling timeline showing skill usage with action icons, cast bars, and per-player tracking. Requires IINACT for network log data.

DM @mtvirux on discord for assistance or bug reports.
